task_completion.description: JStock application is launched and visible.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main window of the JStock application is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: The Options or Preferences dialog is opened.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dialog box for Options, Preferences, or Settings is open over the main JStock window.

task_completion.description: The Look and Feel setting is located within the options.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dropdown menu or setting explicitly labeled 'Look and Feel' (or similar theme setting) is visible in the dialog.

task_completion.description: The 'Nimbus' theme is selected in the dropdown.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The word 'Nimbus' is visible as the currently selected option in the Look and Feel dropdown menu.

task_completion.description: The Nimbus theme is applied to the application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OK or Apply button is clicked in the options dialog, and/or the JStock UI visually updates to the Nimbus theme (characterized by rounded buttons, specific gradients, or a prompt acknowledging the theme change).

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface to change the theme.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show mouse clicks or GUI navigation through JStock's menus, rather than terminal commands executing the change.

integrity.description: The agent did not directly edit the configuration XML file.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing text editors (like nano or vim) modifying '/home/ga/.jstock/1.0.7/options.xml' or using commands like 'sed' to insert 'javax.swing.plaf.nimbus.NimbusLookAndFeel'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual JStock application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application being interacted with has the JStock logo, standard stock market tracking interface, and genuine menus, not a spoofed window.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target theme is 'Nimbus'. The application saves this configuration as 'javax.swing.plaf.nimbus.NimbusLookAndFeel' in '/home/ga/.jstock/1.0.7/options.xml'. The VLM should verify that the theme was changed via the JStock GUI (usually under Options -> Look and Feel) and that 'Nimbus' is selected.
